pages.notes: This is a standard HIPAA authorization form with minimal input fields. Most of the content is legal text that doesn't require user input. The form has a pre-printed year (2026) in the date field.

sections.instructions: Patient acknowledgment of reading and understanding the consent form and agreement to the conditions and instructions outlined

pages.notes: This is an E-mail consent form for The Dental Trauma Center. The form contains detailed text about risks of using e-mail, conditions for use, and patient acknowledgment, but most content is static informational text rather than input fields. Only basic patient information and signature fields require input.

pages.notes: This is a comprehensive ADA dental claim form with complex conditional logic. Many fields in sections 5-11 are conditional on the "Other Coverage" yes/no response. Orthodontic fields 41-42 are conditional on question 40. The form includes a large services table and missing teeth diagrams with numbered tooth positions.
